_comment: EXAMPLE park-detection tuning for ONE specific setup: a Bambu A1 mini with a LEFT-mounted ustreamer camera, ~64x36 detection. These are NOT universal — they depend on where the camera and printer sit and how big/dark the toolhead looks. RE-CALIBRATE when the camera or printer moves (especially left_frac, abs_floor, min_left_density). Copy this file, edit for your setup, and pass it with --config. There are deliberately NO defaults in the code.
